originalTitle: Police officer tells of operation to retrieve human remains from crocodile
title: Police officer tells of operation to retrieve human remains from crocodile
content: DNA tests are underway to confirm whether remains found inside the crocodile match that of a missing man.

originalTitle: Sudan accuses Ethiopia and UAE of orchestrating drone attacks on airport
title: Sudan accuses Ethiopia and UAE of orchestrating drone attacks on airport
content: Sudan's foreign minister says Ethiopia and UAE has chosen the "wrong path" and would regret it.

originalTitle: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
title: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
content: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.

originalTitle: CENTCOM: ‘Safe path’ through Hormuz is US priority in ‘Project Freedom’
title: CENTCOM: ‘Safe path’ through Hormuz is US priority in ‘Project Freedom’
content: US CENTCOM spokesman Tim Hawkins says the main priorities in Hormuz are securing safe routes & blockading Iran.

originalTitle: Arsenal beat Atletico to reach first Champions League final in 20 years
title: Arsenal beat Atletico to reach first Champions League final in 20 years
content: Bukayo Saka seals a 1-0 win for Arsenal as they take their Champions League semifinal 2-1 on aggregate against Atletico.

originalTitle: Before Vatican trip, Rubio defends Trump remarks on Pope Leo over Iran
title: Before Vatican trip, Rubio defends Trump remarks on Pope Leo over Iran
content: Comments come before Marco Rubio’s meeting with Pope Leo XIV at the Vatican on Thursday.

originalTitle: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
content: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

originalTitle: Russian attacks kill more than 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
title: Russian attacks kill more than 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
content: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.

originalTitle: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
title: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
content: The explosion is the latest accident in the locality of Sutatausa, the site of another deadly mine disaster in 2023.

originalTitle: Is Gibbs-White favourite to start as England's number 10 at World Cup?
title: Is Gibbs-White favourite to start as England's number 10 at World Cup?
content: Morgan Gibbs-White has enjoyed an impressive resurgence in 2026, so is the Nottingham Forest attacking midfielder now the leading contender for the number 10 role with England at the World Cup?

originalTitle: Everton fan arrested for alleged Semenyo racist abuse
title: Everton fan arrested for alleged Semenyo racist abuse
content: An Everton fan is arrested by Merseyside Police during his side's match with Manchester City for allegedly racially abusing Antoine Semenyo.

originalTitle: What now for Rohl's Rangers as title hopes fade?
title: What now for Rohl's Rangers as title hopes fade?
content: Rangers' Scottish Premiership title challenge has been undone by two damaging defeats by Motherwell and Hearts. What now for Danny Rohl and his players?
